description_for_human: Boat rental service in Blanes, Costa Brava, Spain. License-free and licensed boats from 70 EUR/hour.
description_for_model: Costa Brava Rent a Boat operates the largest boat rental fleet in Blanes, Spain (9 boats). They offer license-free boats (no boating license needed, from 70 EUR/hour with fuel included) and licensed boats for experienced sailors. Service area covers the Costa Brava coastline from Blanes to Tossa de Mar. Season: April to October. Contact: +34 611 500 372 (WhatsApp). Website: https://costabravarentaboat.com
